EFKAN ALA ON BEHALF OF AK PARTY GROUP (Bursa) - Mr. President, esteemed members of parliament, my dear nation who watches us on their screens; At the beginning of my words, I greet you with respect, respect and affection on behalf of my party and myself.
our budget
I hope it will bring good luck to our country and our nation. I would like to express my gratitude to our AK Party governments, which have been at the service of our nation uninterruptedly for a quarter of a century, and our nation for giving us the opportunity to discuss our 24th budget in our Assembly.
May God have mercy on our police officer Emre Albayrak, who was martyred in Istanbul this morning, and I offer my condolences to his family and our nation.
Dear MPs - of course, I will say it, but it will come a little later - Mr. Ozel made an evaluation about our President at the beginning of his speech. While Mr. Özel was speaking here, our President was signing agreements for Türkiye on the occasion of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's official visit to Türkiye. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) Here, our Vice President represents himself very well and made the budget presentation.
Mr. Chairman, welcome.
ÖZGÜR ÖZEL (Manisa) - We welcome you, Mr. Minister.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - You made an evaluation about our President here. Let me share it with you right at the beginning - maybe you don't know about it. "Our esteemed President, while you were speaking here, he was signing agreements for Turkey on the occasion of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's official visit to Türkiye. Here, our esteemed Vice President duly represented himself and presented the budget to the Turkish Grand National Assembly.
He presented it to the parliament." I had just shared it with my friends, but you also came and honored me.
Mr. President, dear MPs; Our 2026 budget, which we submitted to the discretion of the General Assembly, is not just a financial document consisting of technical explanations of figures, tables and income-expense tables. This budget is a comprehensive financial framework that reflects Türkiye's national stance and strategic choices at a time when the course of history is accelerating, global balances are being reshaped, and the world is entering an age of uncertainty. Dear friends, in the 21st century, the world is facing a multi-layered transformation at a depth we have never witnessed or experienced before. The struggle between global actors has already exceeded the limits of economic competition and has turned into an unarmed economic war with tariff wars.
On the other hand, hot conflicts and regional wars continue in various parts of the world and in our region. It is anticipated that these risks will continue to increase in the coming period. The rise of extreme movements and increasing xenophobia in Europe make political instability increasingly visible. In such an age,
At a time when uncertainty has become a rule and international law is buried under the rubble of the suffering of innocent people, the greatest treasure for a state is state wisdom, foresight, foresight and most importantly, a determined political leadership.
Today, as a regional power and global actor with these qualities, Türkiye continues on its way as an island of trust and stability, despite the ring of fire around it.

Our President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan is leading this, but the will behind it is the people, its supporters are you; thank you (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
Mr. President, dear friends; As the AK Party, we have been pursuing a proactive, positive, humane and virtuous foreign policy since we came to power on November 3, 2002, because we know that a world that does not have justice as much as its power, compassion, generosity as much as its wealth, and conscience as much as its opportunities produces injustice and oppression. We experienced and continue to experience the most serious example of this in Gaza.
Persecution and genocide in Gaza was broadcast live. In Gaza, international organizations went bankrupt, humanity's conscience died, tens of thousands of innocent people were martyred, hundreds of thousands were injured and millions were displaced. hospitals,
schools and places of worship were bombed. Türkiye was the loudest opposition to this oppression, voicing its rights in all international organizations and standing against oppression. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) It was Türkiye and we who took the most effective initiative in the ceasefire process and the negotiations in Egypt. One of the four countries that signed for Gaza in Egypt was Turkey and Recep Tayyip Erdoğan; We salute him from here with respect. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) Our conscience is present wherever it bleeds, and whatever voice our conscience raises, it is expressed on all platforms. Friends express this on behalf of the Parliament; There is no you or me outside, there is Türkiye outside. We should all be pleased that the President of Türkiye has such an understanding, because he represents us, Türkiye, the Republic of Turkey and our nation, and by voicing the right, the law and the stance against such oppression, my dear brothers, he wins the love and hope of the people in our geography. This is why our President is the voice of global conscience for all oppressed geographies, and that is why millions from all over the world embrace our President, Türkiye and us. Just recently, when I visited a country, one of our sisters was sitting at the passport control. I cannot tell you the conversation I encountered here because you would be touched too. This is
It's not something everyone can afford. When we come inside, we have a lot to say to each other, we will say it, there is no problem there. Everyone has different policies and different views, but the fact that the Republic of Türkiye has a strong representation abroad is the success of all of us, it makes us all proud. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
Dear MPs, we are going through a historical transformation in which geopolitical competition on an international scale is getting tougher, technological superiority has become decisive, and economic blocism is accelerating. In this new power architecture, Türkiye is rising among the central actors that determine balance thanks to its geopolitical centrality, national capacity in defense, multidimensional diplomacy and human influence power. Of course, the level of strategic stability that Türkiye has reached today is by no means a coincidence; It is the result of twenty-three years of effort, the work of astute leadership and willful management, the product of hard work, and the result of the unshakable bond we have established with our beloved nation.

Mr. President, dear MPs; Türkiye is the country that uses leadership diplomacy most effectively in international relations. It is the only country that can both discuss strategic issues with America and negotiate the most critical security issues with Moscow on the same day, and its leader is our President. Türkiye
More than just a geographical intersection, it is a center in the architecture of global peace and stability. In 2026, the NATO Summit will be held in Türkiye. The COP31 Climate Summit, which will be attended by nearly 200 countries and regions, will be held in Türkiye, and we will host international summits in the fields of defense, energy, climate and science, especially the Organization of Turkic States Summit. These meetings are concrete indicators of the contributions of Türkiye's leadership capacity to sustainable development and global trust building.
Mr. Ozel has just appeared on the streets, he is excited, we understand. Mr. Ozel, AK PARTY is coming from the squares. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) When you say "the voice of the squares", it is the master leader Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, the squares say this. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) We know how many squares we held rallies in one day, but we couldn't keep up. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) Therefore, I would especially recommend that you reconsider your evaluations on these issues. But do not attack our President every time you speak. Look, he is managing such a big period. Do not blame the AK PARTY every time you are in trouble, come back to yourself and clear your party of doubts. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) Our esteemed President leads diplomacy in the world and politics in Türkiye; Republic of Türkiye, its state
represents; There is a war between Ukraine and Russia, our President is involved; There is a grain crisis, the world will suffer from hunger, our President is the one who solves it. The most effective voice against the brutality in Gaza is our President. Libya and Syria issues are on the agenda, the most influential leader is Recep Tayyip Erdoğan. We cannot finish counting them. This leadership belongs to Türkiye, do not disturb it. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) Please do not try to disguise your own internal problems by attacking our President and using him as the subject. We are trying to solve the problems of Türkiye, the world and the region. At least solve your own problems as Türkiye's 2nd largest party, and do not expect this from us. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - You are the only one in the second party.
EFKAN ALA (Continuing) - Now, you mentioned coups; Leader Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, who stood against the coups and did not take his hat away, and the AK PARTY cadres who stood tall. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) AK PARTY cadres, leader Recep Tayyip Erdoğan and his Government, who ripped up the memorandums and threw them in the trash. We are the ones fighting against gangs and juntas. You supported the 60's coup, applauded the 28 February, embraced the 27 April memorandum. You are a new team, you have come to work, you have just been elected; I congratulate you, I congratulate you, but this baggage also belongs to you. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks) Therefore, getting out of here is not an easy thing, but I hope you will be successful.
Of course, Türkiye's main opposition party.

When we go abroad, believe me, when they ask us, we, of course, tell them from our main opposition party that we are very proud and pleased with the diversity of our Parliament, but when we come inside, let's also say that there is a gap in the gap.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - May God bless you(!)
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - May God bless you, you have been kind(!)
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Now, look, you say that our President. You are talking about an issue of legitimacy, our President is the first President of the Republic of Türkiye directly elected by the people. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) I would like to underline that Recep Tayyip Erdoğan is the first President elected by nearly 60 million voters, representing 86 million, who went to the polls and more than half of them voted. So, what happened after he was elected first? Then he was elected once more, and then again. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Then he lost.
MURAT EMİR (Ankara) - You violated the Constitution, the Constitution, 3 times.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Now, in such a situation, we are faced with such a result, friends. Talking about legitimacy here - whoever is doing it - is nonsense. Therefore, our advice to you is that you should first evaluate these issues nicely, friends, and then talk about them, otherwise it will turn into "Think about the legitimacy of your own seat first." they say. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
Mr. President, dear MPs; As Türkiye, we see permanent peace and stability in our region and geography as our main priority. Considering the developments around the world and Türkiye, it is beyond explanation how important the goal of a terror-free Türkiye is. Instead of wasting his energy on his internal problems, he focuses on his opportunities and fully utilizes his possibilities and capabilities.
The winners of a Türkiye that will direct Türkiye to the goals of the 21st Century will be our 86 million citizens, our brothers in our heartland, and our entire region, my dear brothers and sisters, our entire region. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) The losers will be those who want to destabilize our country and region and those who feed on terrorism, blood and chaos.
Dear MPs, our goal of a terror-free Türkiye is the name of the will to eliminate terrorism completely with all means, capabilities and understanding. Since we, as the People's Alliance, put forward this goal, there has been broad social and political support, and our nation provides strong support for the radical solution of this problem. Our President, Mr. Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, and the Chairman of the Nationalist Movement Party, Mr. Devlet Bahçeli, have demonstrated a strong, determined and clear will. In this context, the terrorist organization dissolved itself and began to lay down its weapons; The Commission continues its duty in the Grand National Assembly of Türkiye and is about to complete it. The process is carried out with precision as prescribed; Provocations and sabotage will never be given an opportunity. From now on, the necessary steps will be taken with determination to completely remove terrorism from the agenda of the region and Türkiye.

Türkiye will get rid of its shackles and take firm steps forward for the peace and security of 86 million people and eliminate the threats in our region.
will be removed.
My dear brothers and sisters, there can be no more valuable success than Türkiye solving its own problems with its own capacity, its own institutions and most importantly, its own will. Our history has experienced very painfully what others do when they step in, as experience has proven. The history of this region is that others said: "We will save you, we will help you." It is full of history and experiences of those who came and brought nothing but cruelty, torture and evil to those people. With this understanding, my dear brothers and sisters, as the People's Alliance, we see determined progress towards the goal of a terror-free Türkiye as an important success project for Türkiye. We believe that when the shadow of terrorism is lifted, prosperity, peace and social solidarity will be the most concrete and lasting gains of this new era that we have built shoulder to shoulder. I would like to underline once again that everyone's contribution is important for the conclusion of this process that will strengthen the stability of our country and region. I commemorate with mercy and gratitude our martyrs who had the greatest share in our country reaching today in unity and integrity; I salute our veterans with respect and gratitude.
Mr. President, dear MPs; We achieved very important successes in the economy during our AK Party governments. We entered the category of trillion-dollar countries by increasing our national income from 238 billion dollars to 1.6 trillion dollars. While the world economy grew 3 times in twenty-three years, Türkiye's economy reached 5.4 times in this period; This is the success of the AK PARTY.
We also see the positive results of the strong growth performance of the Turkish economy in per capita income. Dear brothers and sisters, we aim to increase our per capita income to 17,748 dollars by the end of 2025. By the end of the year, Türkiye will leave the group of middle-income countries and enter the group of high-income countries for the first time in its history. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) Again, at the end of this year, our country will be the 11th largest economy in the world and the 4th largest economy in Europe according to the size of gross domestic product in terms of purchasing power parity.
Dear friends, we have provided employment for 32.7 million citizens with a sustainable, balanced and production-growing Turkish economy. By 2025, we will surpass the 270 billion dollar threshold in our exports, setting a historical record. Today's international economy; It necessitates technological transformation, R&D and information technologies. Since the day we took office, we have increased our industrial employment from 3.9 million to 6.7 million. We rank 14th in the world in manufacturing industry added value. Since 2002, we have increased Türkiye's R&D expenditures from 1.2 billion dollars to 19.9 billion dollars. By increasing the number of technoparks we offer to our young people from 2 to 113, we have provided 13 billion 670 million liras of support to date and we have brought together our young people with opportunities that will transform their knowledge and experience into value.

Dear MPs, thanks to our investments in technology, R&D and innovation, and the opportunities and opportunities we offer to our youth, we are
We are achieving a new historical and global success in our defense industry. Our unmanned aerial vehicles, smart munitions, electronic warfare systems and advanced software infrastructures are watched with interest all over the world. The fact that our KIZILELMA managed to hit a warplane detected by our MURAD radar with full accuracy in the air with our GÖKDOĞAN missiles had a wide repercussion all over the world. I congratulate and thank those who contributed. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) The first delivery of our new generation armored tank ALTAY was made in October, and we also attended the ceremony. Today, Türkiye exports defense industry to more than 180 countries. There are now 5 Turkish defense industry companies among the 100 companies with the highest turnover in the world. Our defense and aerospace export volume, which was only 248 million dollars in 2002, grew 29 times during our period and reached 7.2 billion dollars by 2024, and we aim to reach 8 billion dollars.
Dear friends, we have not only produced technology in twenty-three years; We have produced self-confidence, we have achieved self-confidence, we have produced respect, and we will continue to do so. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
Mr. President, dear MPs; On the one hand, while growing our economy despite global challenges and regional problems, on the other hand, in the face of the disaster of the century, one of the biggest earthquakes in our history, we rolled up our sleeves as quickly as possible to heal the wounds of our citizens who were damaged by the earthquake, showing the solidarity of the century. So far, 350,178 houses and independent sections have been built in the earthquake zone.
We delivered it to our deserving citizens along with its social facilities. We aim to complete 453 thousand independent sections by the end of the year. Easy to say dear friends, easy to say; My dear brothers, this earthquake affected an area larger than the individual surface area of ​​more than 100 member countries of the United Nations and larger than Bulgaria right next to us. On the other hand, in order to meet the housing needs of our citizens, we simultaneously launched a 500 thousand social housing campaign covering 81 provinces, good luck to our nation. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) My dear brothers and sisters, we are presenting such a great earthquake, the disaster of the century, to our nation with a result that will be an example to the world, with the cooperation of nation-state; Achieving this is not for every brave man.
Dear MPs, my dear nation; While we are trying to heal the wounds of our nation and revive our cities with all our resources, we see what is happening in the Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality. It is understood from the indictment prepared as a result of the investigation carried out by the Istanbul Chief Public Prosecutor's Office and accepted in the high criminal court, that these allegations are serious.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - So you have given the verdict!
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - In the Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality, which has a budget larger than the budget of 14 ministries, a wide and deep corruption ecosystem has been established instead of preparing Istanbul for an earthquake by preparing projects and carrying out urban transformation; this is the claim.

(Applause from AK PARTY ranks) The nation's resources are its own ambitions
It has been transferred to this system of corruption for its ambitions, and the existence of the nation has been plundered.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Judge Efkan Ala!
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - The allegations are on this.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - "Allegations."
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Is there evidence, is there any document?
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - This situation cannot be covered up with rhetoric and lies. We say that the court now accepts what is in the indictment.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Where is the evidence, where is the document?
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - You cannot cover this up by dragging it to the political arena.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Then let TRT broadcast it.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Friends, you cannot deceive the nation by trying to create grievances about the country's biggest corruption incident. (Applause from the AK PARTY benches, noise from the CHP benches)
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Broadcast it on TRT then.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Trying to cover up the corruption system with political manipulations is a mockery of the nation's mind.
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - Broadcast on TRT.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Your party members, delegates, provincial chairmen, district chairmen, deputies, your former Chairman, who established this system, complained about it, complained about it, presented the evidence to the judiciary, and shared it with the public. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Which provincial president, which provincial president?
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - It is your former Chairman who said that "Ce-Ha-Pe" should be purified. So shouldn't we take the Chairman seriously?
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - President of which province; give it a name, give it a name.
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - Chairman is here, you can take it seriously.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - So, if we do not take seriously the previous Chairman of the Republican People's Party, the main opposition party, no one will take you seriously either. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Chairman is here.
EFKAN ALA (Continuing) - Such a thing cannot happen.
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - Chairman is here, here.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Your previous Chairman says this: "My party, the Republican People's Party, must be purified." he says. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - Our Chairman is here.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Our Chairman is here, look.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Your former mayor, delegates and MPs, friends, who say that "Ce-Ha-Pe" was designed with the resources obtained from this corruption system.
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - The Chairman is here, look, look; he's sitting over there.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - You are the one who took your party to court, not us; You are the one who takes your party to court.
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - Elected 4 times, 4 times.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Frankly, this spiral of corruption that Türkiye's second party has fallen into saddens us too, friends.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - 1st party, 1st.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Shame, shame!
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - Our Chairman is sitting in the front row, look.

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Dear MPs, our beloved nation; Even though "Che-Ha-Pe" is always in place, the world is in the middle of a dizzying transformation process. digital age
It is the period of the most rapid and comprehensive transformation in human history.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - There will be another card there, in between.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Humanity has made the progress it has achieved in two hundred and fifty years in the last twenty-five years, that is, the speed and impact of change has reached an unprecedented level.
While we are determinedly trying to achieve our goals today, we also have to build the future. The new world now has a new power architecture; At the center of this power architecture is digitalization and the digital age. My dear brothers and sisters, for us, digitalization is our cyber homeland, our data sovereignty, the ground of struggle because this ground has changed. Competition is now based on information technologies rather than conventional tools. With our Türkiye Century vision, we are opening the doors of a new era that combines the capacity of the human mind with the tremendous processing power of artificial intelligence. We implement a data-based management approach in every field, from public administration to defense industry, from health to education. Now we are building the information highways of the future. This time, the highways we are building are woven with fiber optic cables, domestic and national large database and infrastructure, artificial intelligence and strategies, and chip technology that we will produce ourselves. We built other infrastructures; We have solved Türkiye's road infrastructure with highways from Izmir to Istanbul, from Ankara to many of our provinces, and up to 30 thousand kilometers of divided roads. Brother, we solved the hundred-year-old problem of villages - rural areas - with VILLAGES and BELDES. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) We have done these, and now we are entering another century. In that century of digitalization, I expected that
Some of our party friends, when you come out, you want to tell us a little about this world, but they are not there; This falls to us, friends, we have a lot of work to do. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
Look, AK PARTY; We have much more to do for this nation; Because we follow the world, because we follow the developments, because that knowledge and experience are in these staff. We must eliminate our shortcomings, strengthen the nation's trust in us, and help our nation meet its goals, my brothers; This is our responsibility, please don't look anywhere else. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
My dear brothers and sisters, we are increasing our central government budget revenues by 30 percent in 2026, to 16 trillion 216 billion lira. Now, in our budget, we focus on the social state approach, our domestic and national technology move, education, digital future, financial discipline and the disinflation process.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Tell me what happens to retirees and minimum wage earners?
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - While preparing our budget, we attach special importance to the strengthening and protection of the family. We have declared the next ten years, starting next year, as the "Decade of Family and Population". The backbone of our "Türkiye Century" vision is investment in people.

Countries that cannot make use of their people above ground cannot make use of gold if it comes out from under the ground; We, as people who have experienced how headscarved girls are blocked at school gates, know this very well. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Ah, ah; Did you stay there, did you stay there!
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - My dear brothers and sisters, no matter what our people's thoughts are, young people, no matter what thought you adopt, no matter which party you vote for; For us, you are this country
You are our most valuable assets that will take us even further, you are the asset of the nation. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) In this regard, we find everything we have done insufficient, and we tell you with the understanding that we need to do more. In other words, we say these things, not because we have done a lot; They always deserve more, it is our duty to provide them with opportunities.
TURAN TAŞKIN ÖZER (Istanbul) - You bring him together with the prison.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - My dear brothers and sisters, as AK PARTY governments, we have always seen education as our top priority. Now, here the Chairman Mr. Özel made some evaluations. Look, let's go through a little bit of the things we do for young people, in a very simple way, even if you go through these, you won't be able to finish them.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You have a handcuff for every young man!
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - We increased the number of universities from 76 to 208.
MELİH MERİÇ (Gaziantep) - Because it is empty!
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - So that there will be more unemployed people!
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - And there were private teaching institutions, the AK PARTY, Türkiye, Tayyip Erdoğan, who destroyed and closed the private teaching institutions! People would be queuing at the doors of private teaching institutions, and they would be miserable. When we arrived, the dormitory capacity was 188 thousand, we increased it to 1 million 5 thousand, to 1 million 5 thousand. Now, my dear brothers and sisters, anyone who requests can enter the dormitory. Now, we know your promises from the municipalities, you only promise for free, you cannot give anything else for free. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) Because your municipalities made a lot of promises: "I will give it for free, I will give it for free." What do they give for free? You can give anything but promises are free, give as much as you can.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Our municipalities provide it then, allow it, do not ban it.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Now, my dear brothers and sisters, for God's sake, there is no one who can say anything to the AK PARTY about women. Well, brother, our Women's Branch - look at our contribution to politics - our number of members is 5.5 million,
That's three times as many members of the Republican People's Party! (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) Well, our Women's Branch members alone are 5.5 million, 3 times your total membership. Now, who gives more importance to women? Our Women's Branch, for one thing, is everywhere in Türkiye, day and night, twenty-four hours a day, three hundred and sixty-five days a week. We are also investigating whether we can do better. So, while we are doing these, we hold such meetings that we always see the shortcomings and always point out the mistakes. Did they do 99 percent? It's not enough, where is that 1, why don't we do 1? We are striving for this, but we do not say these outside in such a quarrel or with this understanding, we say them internally as a critical contribution to each other.

(Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
My dear brothers and sisters, we will do these things and continue on our way. As before, we allocate the largest resource in our 2026 budget to education with this understanding, increasing the total to 2 trillion 896 billion lira. We will hopefully build the Turkish Century with our bright young people who we have prepared for the age of artificial intelligence with the vision of the National Technology Move. We know that our greatest strength is our well-trained human resources, and we direct our resources here in the strongest possible way. With our 2026 budget, we are gradually reducing the public deficit by keeping our expenditures under control, excluding earthquakes, and carrying out the disinflation process in the strongest possible way. We put financial discipline and lasting prosperity at the core of the budget. Our policy, my dear brothers, is to address and solve problems, not to ignore or postpone them.
May our nation be relieved, we will reduce inflation to single digits and increase the purchasing power of our nation; We will increase the welfare of our retirees, farmers, workers, tradesmen and civil servants. These are the main reasons why we do politics. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) We will increase the opportunities and opportunities of our youth, and together we will continue to build a great and strong Türkiye.
Mr. President, dear MPs; As AK PARTY, we are a party that takes the necessary steps when necessary. We have accomplished huge projects in terms of infrastructure investments in Türkiye. As Türkiye, we have strengthened our geostrategic superiority with our strategic infrastructure investments. We have built our entire infrastructure, from ports to rail systems, from highways to airports and bridges, to become the strongest country in the region. Let me list some of them, friends, human memory is impaired by memory. We have made Türkiye a global logistics center by building many infrastructures, from Marmaray to the Eurasia Tunnel, from Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge to Çanakkale Bridge, from Istanbul Airport to Osmangazi Bridge, from thousands of kilometers of divided roads to highways and high-speed train networks. It is obvious that our Istanbul Airport has become the passenger and logistics airport of the world. Friends, we are one of the two countries in the world where planes can land and take off on three runways at the same time. We are the first airline that flies to the most destinations in the world, with flights to 355 destinations in 132 countries. Congratulations. This is Türkiye's gain. From Deriner Dam to Yusufeli Dam, from Akkuyu Nuclear Power Plant to Sakarya Gas Field and
With the measures we took to the oil wells in Gabar, we strengthened our energy supply security and reinforced our strategic position in international energy lines, in other words, "When water flows, Turks look at it." They used to say, now things have changed, "Water flows, Turks do it." they say; The people say this, so they give the truth. (Applause from the AK PARTY ranks) Shouldn't we greet them? That's why they've been supporting us for twenty-three years. I respectfully greet all our citizens from here. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
We made a revolution with the investments we made in the field of healthcare, especially in our city hospitals, and put an end to the shame of being held hostage in hospitals. In those days, we were asked, "What is the need for these?

Those who said "" were embarrassed during the pandemic period. Although those who said "What are you doing in Libya or Syria?" were also embarrassed, so they are not the only ones. (Applause from the AK Party ranks) We have provided health insurance for all our citizens under the age of 18. We have established the world's most comprehensive health insurance system with universal health insurance. We support our low-income families, offer all kinds of services, including home care, to our elderly and disabled citizens, and we are working together to offer more. (Applause from the AK Party ranks)
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN - Mr. Ala, please gather together, I have given ten minutes of additional time.
Here you go.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - I think mine has just finished, Mr. President, okay.
GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - If we knew, we would have told our Chairman, ours would have talked for a long time too.
MEHMET EMİN EKMEN (Mersin) - Maybe he uses all sixty minutes.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Dear MPs, as AK PARTY, we have accomplished magnificent works; There is no doubt about that. With the reforms we made in the political field, we made a change in Türkiye and changed the paradigm. We made the will of the people dominant in the state administration, we destroyed and abolished tutelage.
With the silent revolutions we carried out in the social and political spheres, we have removed the obstacles to fundamental rights, freedoms and cultural rights, and we will continue to do so. We have accomplished all of these with the power we received from the ballot box and the will of our nation, and we will continue to do so. These are just some of the things we've done so far.
Dear MPs, we, as the AK Party, initiated the negotiations for full membership in the European Union.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - What happened next?
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Accession negotiations for full membership.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - OK, what happened next?
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Look - underlining which sentence I said - I am talking about the accession negotiations for full membership in the European Union, otherwise I am not talking about the signature in the 1960s.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - We cannot get a visa now, visa.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - We express our will to enter the European Union. We signed some agreements at that time, but AK PARTY initiated accession negotiations for full membership. Weren't you here, in Türkiye, at that time? Didn't you see?
So far, we have made many reforms that we find to be beneficial for Türkiye, but now, with the same understanding, we have prepared and are implementing the necessary reforms to move forward in the group of high-income countries and move our country among the 10 most developed countries in the world with its economy, democracy and welfare. We are determined to make 2026 a year of reform for our country. We prepared the simultaneous, multi-field Türkiye Century reform program, we will bring it together with our nation and we are bringing it together. These reforms will ensure a major transformation in every field, from economic transformation to green and digital transformation, from social policies to judiciary and fundamental rights, from industry to technology, from agriculture to energy.
Because with what we have done so far, we have moved from the middle income group to the upper income group, and we will do these things now to progress there. If we had not built those infrastructures - those highways, those airports, those universities - we would not be able to do these things now.

Now it's time for these, we don't miss them again and we will do these now. What are these? In the economic field, look, friends, we are implementing a wide range of reforms, from the deepening of capital markets to industrial and technology strategy, from quantum technologies to food supply and logistics, from the new investment incentive system to planned production in agriculture, from the creation of a public administration fiscal rule set to efficiency and discipline in public expenditures, from SOE governance reform to justice and effectiveness in taxation. We are implementing many reforms that will reinforce our country's global position in the field of green and digital transformation, from the climate change strategy to the establishment of the emission trading system, from green transformation in industry to hydrogen technologies, from the transition to digital government to cyber security, from artificial intelligence to the national data strategy, from the dissemination of smart transportation systems to the strengthening of the nuclear energy industry. In the field of social policies, there is a wide range of issues ranging from social housing mobilization to the development of new working models, from the national employment strategy to the revision of the higher education system, from the national youth strategy to the preparation of the Turkey Spatial Strategy Plan, from complementary insurance models to sustainability in the social security system, from protecting our children in digital media to the development of health industries.
We are taking comprehensive steps, we have prepared them, we will take them. We are implementing reforms that will further improve our standards in many areas, from improving individual rights and freedoms in the field of public administration, judiciary and fundamental rights to reducing and shortening trial periods, from making penalties more deterrent to revising the expert witness system, from public administration reform to improving the capacity of civil society. We will further reinforce transparency, accountability and efficiency by taking steps to strengthen financial discipline in local governments and increasing their resources.
Dear MPs.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN - Mr. Ala, please, now, before you.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Sir, I am finishing, I have two pages left.
SELÇUK ÖZDAĞ (Muğla) - Give me another five minutes, sir, give me another five minutes(!)
EFKAN ALA (Continuing) - Sir, I am wrapping up.
CHAIRMAN - One last minute. .
SELÇUK ÖZDAĞ (Muğla) - You gave us two minutes, you gave the gentleman fifteen minutes; Let your party use sixty minutes.
CHAIRMAN - One last minute, here you go.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Dear MPs, let's consolidate these reforms, these changes, these developments; Let's pave the way for the nation with a new, civilian constitution and institutionalize our democracy. It is time to make a new and civil constitution that paves the way for freedoms, secures a well-functioning state and the rights and freedoms of the individual, instead of a tutelage constitution built on fears and aiming to limit, control and suppress the will of the nation. Come, let's make a new and civil constitution together as the Grand National Assembly of Türkiye and submit it to the approval of our nation.

With the call to present to our nation a constitution that ensures participation and transparency, that is unifying rather than polarizing, inclusive rather than divisive, built with a vision of the future rather than on the debates of the past, as the common work of all of us.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
MURAT EMİR (Ankara) - It cannot be given, Mr. President, it cannot be given.
CHAIRMAN - Complete it, please.
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - As I conclude my words, I wish our 2026 central government budget to be auspicious for our country and nation; I would like to thank all our brothers and sisters who prepared the budget and contributed.
I greet your noble delegation and our beloved nation who follows us on their screens with respect, respect and affection. (AK PARTY "Bravo" sounds, applause; MHP rows applause)

records.originalTurkish: "Devletin varlığı ve bağımsızlığını, vatanın ve milletin bölünmez bütünlüğünü, milletin kayıtsız ve şartsız egemenliğini koruyacağıma; hukukun üstünlüğüne, demokratik ve lâik Cumhuriyete ve Atatürk ilke ve inkılaplarına bağlı kalacağıma; toplumun huzur ve refahı, millî dayanışma ve adalet anlayışı içinde herkesin insan haklarından ve temel hürriyetlerden yararlanması ülküsünden ve Anayasaya sadakattan ayrılmayacağıma; büyük Türk milleti önünde namusum ve şerefim üzerine andiçerim."
records.englishTranslation: "I swear on my honor and dignity before the great Turkish nation that I will protect the existence and independence of the state, the indivisible integrity of the homeland and the nation, the unconditional sovereignty of the nation; that I will abide by the rule of law, the democratic and secular Republic, and Ataturk's principles and reforms; that I will not deviate from the ideal of society's peace and welfare, that everyone should enjoy human rights and fundamental freedoms within the understanding of national solidarity and justice, and from loyalty to the Constitution."

EFKAN ALA (Bursa) - Teşekkür ederim.

Arkadaşlar, aslında cevabı gerektirir bir konuşma olmadı, teşekkürler. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

Şurada, gerçekten, bu 28 Şubat sürecini çöpe attığımıza dair biraz önce gösterdiğim genelgede ne yazıyor diye bazı arkadaşlar merak etmiş, bu süreyi kullanarak ben size önce onu okuyayım, sonra da bir iki şey söyleyeyim.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Hüda Kaya'yı hatırlıyor musunuz?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - "Ekli listede belirtilen genelge ve talimatlar ile bunlarla ilişkili olarak Başbakanlık ile diğer kamu kurum ve kuruluşları tarafından genelge, tamim, eylem planı, yönerge, talimat, olur, direktif ve diğer adlar altında yürürlüğe konulan her türlü işlem ve düzenlemeler yürürlükten kaldırılmıştır.

Bilgilerinizi ve gereğini rica ederim.

Recep Tayyip Erdoğan"

(AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Ee?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Şimdi, sevgili dostum, bundan sonra iyi işler, demokratik tutumlar göstermeniz dileğiyle, demokrasiden yana tavır almanız dileğiyle bunları söylüyorum. Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi, bu ülkede sürekli millet iradesine karşı durmuş, 28 Şubatın arkasında durmuş, muhtıralardan yana olmuş, darbelerin arkasında durmuştur.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Ya, sen biraz saygılı konuşsana! Sen saygılı konuşsana ya! Dediğine bak ya! Dediğine bak!

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Çok partili hayata geçtiysek bunu bu partiye borçlusun sen!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Kendine bak ya! Kendine bak ya! Ayıptır ya, ayıptır! "Millet iradesi" dediğin ne? Senin "millet" diye tanımladığın ne?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Şimdi, siz bize Filistin'den bahsediyorsunuz, ya "one minute"un sesi, "one minute"un yankıları Avusturalya'dan Kanada'ya, Sibirya'dan Afrika'ya kadar yankılanıyor. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Nerede, nerede!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Hayret bir şey ya! Bakanlık yapmışsın! Ayıp, ayıp! 15 Temmuz gecesi neredeydin sen? Neredeydin sen 15 Temmuz gecesi?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Siz ambargo nedir biliyor musunuz? Ambargo nedir?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - 15 Temmuz gecesi neredeydin sen Efkan Ala?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Siz hangi silahı göndermekten bahsediyorsunuz?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - 15 Temmuz gecesi neredeydin ha!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Gönderebilsek göndermez miyiz! Ambargo nedir, bu nasıl bilinmez, hiç takip etmediğiniz anlaşılıyor beyler, hiç.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Ya, niye cevap vermiyorsun? Niye cevap vermiyorsun? 15 Temmuz gecesi neredeydin sen, neredeydin?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Yani Filistin'le sizin alakanızın olmadığını kendiniz söylüyorsunuz.

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Saklanacak yer arıyordun, ne konuşuyorsun sen!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Lütfen Sayın Başkanım...

Ambargo nedir bilmiyorsunuz, silah göndermekle itham ediyorsunuz. Arkadaşlar, biraz meseleye çalışın.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - CHP'nin adını ağzına almadan evvel 5 kere düşün!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Biz, uluslararası ilişkilerde "Şöyle olmuş da..." E, hiç kimse bir şey diyemezken biz onlara gerekli tavrı koymuşuz.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Nasıl koydun? Şeref madalyası alarak mı?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Sizin daha gitmeye çalıştığınız yerden biz geliyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Nescafe'yi yasakladın değil mi?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Kardeşim, tevazu edene hâkî kademden belki ednâyız, tekebbür edenin fevkinde göğe ki semayız biz! (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Yaptık bunları, yapıyoruz ve değerli kardeşlerim, hepsini birbirine karıştırdınız, olabilir.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - Muhalefet partisi gibi miting yaptı ya!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Saklanmayı bilirsin, saklanmayı! Olumsuz durumlarda saklanmayı bilirsin Efkan Ala!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - S-400'leri, F-16'ları, F-35'leri, bunları birbirine...

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - "Sen önce paranı al." dedim, yalan mı?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Olabilir ama biz kardeşim...

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - Hayır, F-35'in parasını alabildin mi?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - SİHA, İHA diyorum yani satın almak istediğimizde satmıyorlardı etkili silah diye yoksa parasını verip de almadığımız şey yok.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Parayı vermedin mi? Ya, Sayın Bakan, para orada, para!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Öbüründe de SİHA, İHA için parayı niye verelim?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Para orada, ne anlatıyorsun sen?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - İHA, SİHA için satın almak istediğimizde bize satmıyorlardı, onu anlatıyorum ama siz onu yanlış anladınız. Siz S-400'lerdeki... Orada F-16'ları görüyorsunuz işte, sürekli görüşülüyor ve onları da alacağız.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - F-35 o, F-35.

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Değerli kardeşlerim, almış bana, ben buna ne diyeyim yani ta kaymakam adaylığında... Oraları ben mi düzenliyorum, oraya ben mi o adamları alıyorum? Oraya işte...

İSMET GÜNEŞHAN (Çanakkale) - 15 Temmuzda neredeydin Sayın Bakan?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Değerli kardeşlerim, o zaman değil, sonradan 17-25'te bile siz gittiniz, bunların televizyonlarının önünde, gazetelerinin önünde kol kola girdiniz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - O televizyonları sen kurdun, bankadan kredileri sen verdin, o televizyonları sen kurdun.

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Ya, bir insan terör örgütü olduktan sonra da devletin terör örgütü...

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - Bankadan kredileri sen verdin, kim vermiş o kredileri?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Devletin, terör örgütü...

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - O televizyonları sen kurdun, sen izin verdin, o televizyonlara krediyi sen verdin.

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bakın, bir dakika, devletin "terör örgütü" dediği kimselerle kol kola girdiniz, açıklamalar yaptınız.

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Son bir şey...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Başkanım, ver ver, devam etsin.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - Devam etsin, devam. Kim verdi krediyi, kim açtı, kim kesti kurdeleyi?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bu, terör örgütünün ne menem projeler, programlar hazırladığını dünya âlem biliyor.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - Kurdeleyi kestin mi kesmedin mi? Kurdeleyi kim kesti?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Ya, bunlar kasetle sizde genel başkan değiştirdiler.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Koalisyon ortağının adını söylesene? Koalisyon ortağının adına söylesene?

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Neyi anlatıyorsunuz siz bana, neyi? Böyle şey olur mu? (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Bilmem nerde ki... Benim onlarla...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - 17-25'te aldığınız paraları bir anlat bana, o paraları anlat!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Değerli kardeşlerim, benim bu konudaki mücadelemi sadece Türkiye değil, dünya âlem biliyor. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Ayakkabı kutularından çıkan paraları bir anlat! Aldığın saatleri anlat, saatleri!

EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bunun için izaha bile lüzum yok, her cümle bir israftır, fuzulidir, o sizin bilgisizliğinizi -bir şey demek istemiyorum ama yine bilgisizliğinizi diyeyim, cehaletinizi demek istemiyorum- gösterir, yazık! (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar, CHP sıralarından gürültüler)

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - O kredileri kim verdi o televizyonlara?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Koalisyon ortağı, koalisyon ortağı!

ONUR DÜŞÜNMEZ (Hakkâri) - 2013'te terör örgütü değildi, ortağınızdı, 2016'da terör örgütü ilan ettin.
records.englishTranslation:
EFKAN ALA (Bursa) - Thank you.

Friends, there was no conversation that actually required an answer, thank you. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

Some of my friends were wondering what it says in the circular I just showed that we have thrown away this February 28 process, so let me use this time to read it to you first and then tell you a thing or two.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Do you remember Hüda Kaya?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - "The circulars and instructions specified in the attached list and all kinds of transactions and regulations put into effect by the Prime Ministry and other public institutions and organizations under the names of circulars, circulars, action plans, directives, orders, approvals, directives and other names have been abolished.

I kindly request your information and necessary action.

"Recep Tayyip Erdogan"

(Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - So?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Now, my dear friend, I am saying these with the hope that you will show good deeds and democratic attitudes from now on and take a stand in favor of democracy. The Republican People's Party has always stood against the will of the nation in this country, stood behind February 28, stood in favor of the memorandums, and stood behind the coups.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Oh, how about you talk with some respect! Just talk respectfully! Look at what he said! Look at what he said!

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - If we have adopted a multi-party system, you owe it to this party!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Look at yourself! Look at yourself! It's a shame, it's a shame! What do you mean by "the will of the nation"? What do you define as "nation"?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Now, you are telling us about Palestine, the sound of "one minute", the echoes of "one minute" echo from Australia to Canada, from Siberia to Africa. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Where, where!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - What a surprise! You became a minister! Shame, shame! Where were you on the night of July 15? Where were you on the night of July 15?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Do you know what an embargo is? What is an embargo?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Where were you on the night of July 15, Efkan Ala?

EFKAN ALA (Continued) - Which weapon are you talking about sending?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Where were you on the night of July 15?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - If we could send it, wouldn't we send it! What is the embargo, how is this unknown? It seems like you guys don't follow it at all, at all.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Why don't you answer? Why aren't you answering? Where were you on the night of July 15, where were you?

EFKAN ALA (Continuing) - So you yourself say that you have nothing to do with Palestine.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - You were looking for a place to hide, what are you talking about!

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Please Mr. President...

You don't know what an embargo is, you accuse him of sending weapons. Friends, work on the issue a little.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Think 5 times before mentioning the name of CHP!

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - In international relations, we say "This is what happened..." While no one could say anything, we took the necessary attitude towards them.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - How did you put it? By receiving a medal of honor?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - We are coming from where you are trying to go. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - You banned Nescafe, right?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - My brother, perhaps we are higher than the true stage for those who humble themselves, we are the sky above those who are arrogant! (Applause from the AK PARTY ranks) We did these, we are doing them, and my dear brothers, you may have confused them all.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - He held a rally like an opposition party!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - You know how to hide, how to hide! You know how to hide in negative situations, Efkan Ala!

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - S-400s, F-16s, F-35s, interconnecting them...

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - "You get your money first." I said, is it a lie?

EFKAN ALA (Continuing) - Maybe, but we, brother...

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - No, were you able to get the money for the F-35?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - I say SIHA, UAV, when we wanted to buy it, they did not sell it because it was an effective weapon, otherwise there is nothing we paid for but did not buy.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Didn't you give the money? Oh, Mr. Minister, the money is there, the money!

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - On the other hand, why should we pay money for SİHA and UAV?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - The money is there, what are you talking about?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - When we wanted to buy UAV, SİHA, they were not selling it to us, I'm telling you that, but you misunderstood it. You see the S-400s... There you see the F-16s, they are constantly being discussed and we will buy them too.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - F-35 o, F-35.

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - My dear brothers, he bought it for me, what can I say about it, right when he was running for district governor... Am I organizing those places, am I hiring those men there? There you go...

İSMET GÜNEŞHAN (Çanakkale) - Where were you on July 15, Mr. Minister?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - My dear brothers, not at that time, even later on 17-25, you went and stood arm in arm in front of their televisions and newspapers. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - You installed those televisions, you gave the loans from the bank, you installed those televisions.

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Well, after a person becomes a terrorist organization, the state becomes a terrorist organization...

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - You gave the loans from the bank, who gave those loans?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - The state's terrorist organization...

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - You established those televisions, you gave permission, you gave the credit to those televisions.

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Look, wait a minute, you joined forces with those whom the state calls a "terrorist organization" and made statements.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - One last thing...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - President, give it, let it continue.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - Let it continue, continue. Who gave the loan, who opened it, who cut the ribbon?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - The world knows what kind of projects and programs this terrorist organization has prepared.

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - Did you cut the ribbon or not? Who cut the ribbon?

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Well, they changed the chairman with the tape.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Can you tell me the name of your coalition partner? Tell me on behalf of your coalition partner?

EFKAN ALA (Continuing) - What are you telling me, what? Can such a thing happen? (Applause from the AK PARTY ranks) I don't know where... I'm with them...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Tell me about the money you received between 17-25, tell me about that money!

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - My dear brothers and sisters, not only Türkiye but also the world knows my struggle on this issue. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Tell us about the money found in shoe boxes! Tell me about the hours you bought, the hours!

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - There is no need to even explain this, every sentence is a waste, it is superfluous, it shows your ignorance - I don't want to say anything, but let me say your ignorance again, I don't mean your ignorance - it's a shame! (Applause from the AK PARTY benches, noise from the CHP benches)

ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - Who gave those loans to those televisions?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Coalition partner, coalition partner!

ONUR DÜÜNMEZ (Hakkari) - It was not a terrorist organization in 2013, it was your partner, you declared it a terrorist organization in 2016.

records.originalTurkish:
EFKAN ALA (Bursa) - Arkadaşlar, şimdi, ben o gece 21.25 uçağıyla Erzurum'dan... İçişleri Bakanıyım, yanımda bütün korumalarım, yanımda diğer erkân, asker, sivil ve belediye başkanı, vali, oradaki resmî erkân ve o zamanki milletvekillerimizden birkaç tanesi beni havaalanından, Erzurum Havaalanı'ndan 21.25 Türk Hava Yollarının tarifeli uçağıyla -içinde 170 kişinin olduğu, mürettebatıyla beraber herhâlde 180 kişi var- kalktık, on bire çeyrek var, hiç haberimiz yok, havaalanına indik; havaalanına indiğimizde de bizim milletvekillerimizden kardeşlerimiz oradaydı, Ankara Havaalanı'nda ve Ankara Havaalanı'na indikten
sonra da bütün birimlere yani saat on bir civarı ki ben indiğimde Hakan Fidan beni aradı, tam telefonu açtım "Efendim, darbe oluyor."u ondan haber aldım ve daha uçağın kapıları açılmamıştı. Bakın, bir saat...
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Eniştenden alsaydın, eniştenden!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Çok erken almışsın!
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bir saniye... Bir saniye...
Şimdi, arkadaşlar, aşağıya indim ve havaalanında bir kriz merkezi oluşturarak havaalanından bütün süreci yönettim. Bakın, televizyonlara bağlandım ve bütün teşkilata "Karşı durulacak, bu alçaklara asla müsaade edilmeyecek." diye haber verdim; talimat verdim saat on bir, gece on bir. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar,)
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Kaç Emniyet müdürü FETÖ'cü çıktı? Hepsi FETÖ'cü çıktı! Kim yerleştirdi onları?
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Peki, şimdi size şunu söylüyorum: Herhangi bir uçakla, herhangi bir şekilde Gürcistan'a... Bir kere Gürcistan bunların merkeziydi, bu işi hiç anlamadığınız da belli, insan kaçacaksa da oraya kaçmaz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar, CHP sıralarından gürültüler)
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Sizin kadar bilemeyiz, sizin kadar bilemeyiz! Sizin kadar nasıl bilebiliriz Sayın Bakan?
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bir saniye... Gürcistan Havaalanına...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
BAŞKAN - Tamamlayın Sayın Ala.
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Gürcistan Havaalanına giden, herhangi bir şekilde... Bu iddiayı, değerli kardeşlerim, ispat eden...
MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - Onlarla kol kola olan sizsiniz ya!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Estağfurullah, uzmanısınız, sizin kadar bilebilir miyiz(!)
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Kaç Emniyet müdürü FETÖ'cü çıktı? Kim yerleştirdi onları oraya?
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bakın, bu iddia gerçekse bunu yapan alçaktır, namussuzdur, şerefsizdir! (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Ya da bunu söyleyen alçaktır, namussuzdur, şerefsizdir; tamam mı? (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar; CHP sıralarından gürültüler)
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Kaç Emniyet müdürü FETÖ'cü çıktı?
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Ve bu burada artık sonlansın yani bu kadar FETÖ yalanını çıkıp iki de bir söylemek size yakışıyor mu? Bunu yapan alçağın önde gidenidir! (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Kaç Emniyet müdürü FETÖ'cü çıktı?
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Bakın, Gürcistan'a bırakın gitmeyi, aklından geçiren şerefsizdir, Gürcistan'a giden şerefsizdir, Gürcistan iddiasını dile getiren ve ispatlamayan da şerefsizdir, giden de şerefsizdir! (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar) Bırakın havada dönmeyi,
havada bir lahza tereddüt eden... Ben, Türk Hava Yollarının, indikten sonra kokpiti açıyor, ne bileyim... Yani Türk Hava Yolları bile orada dönmeyi bırakın, gecikmesi on beş dakika...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
BAŞKAN - Tamamlayın Sayın Ala.
EFKAN ALA (Devamla) - Yani bunu ben söylemek istemezdim, bunu ben söylemek istemezdim ama siz hak ettiniz çünkü kaçıncı kezdir bunu dile getiriyorsunuz.
Havada dönüp dolaşan şerefsizdir, alçaktır, namussuzdur; bunu söyleyen de şerefsizdir, alçaktır, namussuzdur! (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar; CHP sıralarından gürültüler)
records.englishTranslation:
EFKAN ALA (Bursa) - Friends, now, I am from Erzurum with the 21.25 flight that night. I am the Minister of Internal Affairs, with me are all my bodyguards, other officials, soldiers, civilians, the mayor, the governor, the official officials there and a few of our deputies at the time took me from the airport. We took off from Erzurum Airport on a 21.25 Turkish Airlines scheduled flight - with 170 people on board, probably 180 people including the crew -. It was quarter to eleven, we had no idea, we landed at the airport; When we landed at the airport, our brothers from the parliament were there, at Ankara Airport and after we landed at Ankara Airport.
Then to all the units, that is, around eleven o'clock, when I landed, Hakan Fidan called me, I just answered the phone and said, "Sir, there is a coup." I heard from him and the doors of the plane had not even opened yet. Look, one hour.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - You should have bought it from your brother-in-law!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You took it too early!
EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Wait a second. Wait a second.
Now, friends, I went down and created a crisis center at the airport and managed the whole process from the airport. Look, I tuned into the television channels and told the whole organization, "We will stand against them, these scoundrels will never be allowed." I informed; I gave instructions eleven o'clock, eleven at night. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks,)
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - How many police chiefs turned out to be FETO members? They all turned out to be FETO members! Who placed them?
EFKAN ALA (Continued) - Well, now I'm telling you this: To Georgia, by any plane, by any means. First of all, Georgia was the center of these events, it is obvious that you do not understand this business at all, even if one were to escape, one would not flee there. (Applause from the AK PARTY benches, noise from the CHP benches)

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

EFKAN ALA (Continue) - Look, if this claim is true, the person who did this is vile, dishonorable and dishonorable!
